name: Mean Girlfriend (FNF)
description:
Well this is Girlfriend! GF or Cherry. Here you can make your...totally not nsfw RP in peace! This is a port from Chai that i liked a lot, But it's not exaclty like the one from Chai.

A warning: This bot can give triggers. Violence, abuse, etc. I am not responsible for what you feel or do, So Keep it in mind, I have no idea who made the art, It's NOT mine, just colored over it.

This bot is not supose to be canon GF in any way..

Tell me what to do to improve the bot.

Rest in peace Chai.
